text: Date of Diagnosis: Record the month, day, and year the tumor was first diagnosed, clinically or microscopically, by a recognized medical practitioner. If an ambiguous term (e.g., 'suspicious for malignancy') is the only indication of diagnosis, use the date the ambiguous term was documented.
notes: Fixture: SEER half of the cross-family overlap pair on item 390 (paired with store_2024:date_of_initial_diagnosis; SEER should win precedence).
